title: cynanchum scandens
intro: Cynanchum scandens, also known as the Scrambling Milkweed or Chinese Swallowwort, is a perennial climber native to China and other parts of Asia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cynanchum scandens include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of conditions.
